'''fafungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iganidipine|iganidipine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iganidipine|iganidipine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fafungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfingith|fæfingith]] || [[word:fæfingij|fæfingij]] || [[word:fæfingish|fæfingish]] || [[word:fæfingi|fæfingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafufunguth|fafufunguth]] || [[word:fafufunguj|fafufunguj]] || [[word:fafufungush|fafufungush]] || [[word:fafufungu|fafufungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafunguth|fafunguth]] || [[word:fafunguj|fafunguj]] || [[word:fafungush|fafungush]] || [[word:fafungu|fafungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafufnguth|fafufnguth]] || [[word:fafufnguj|fafufnguj]] || [[word:fafufngush|fafufngush]] || [[word:fafufnguf|fafufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafunguthu|fafunguthu]] || [[word:fafunguju|fafunguju]] || [[word:fafungushu|fafungushu]] || [[word:fafunguku|fafunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafunguth|fafunguth]] || [[word:fafunguj|fafunguj]] || [[word:fafungush|fafungush]] || [[word:fafungu|fafungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafunguthul|fafunguthul]] || [[word:fafungujul|fafungujul]] || [[word:fafungushul|fafungushul]] || [[word:fafungukul|fafungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafunguthuthu|fafunguthuthu]] || [[word:fafungujuju|fafungujuju]] || [[word:fafungushushu|fafungushushu]] || [[word:fafunguku|fafunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafunguthun|fafunguthun]] || [[word:fafungujun|fafungujun]] || [[word:fafungushun|fafungushun]] || [[word:fafungukun|fafungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafunguthuoro|fafunguthuoro]] || [[word:fafungujuoro|fafungujuoro]] || [[word:fafungushuoro|fafungushuoro]] || [[word:fafungukuoro|fafungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
